---
title: "A Quarto book — chapters, cross-refs and an index"
description: "Multi-chapter projects with automatic numbering, a cross-referenced index, and both an HTML website and a typeset PDF."
image: thumbnail.svg
image-alt: "A Quarto book — chapters, cross-refs and an index — Blood Doctor · Quarto"
date: "2026-07-13"
categories: [Documents]
engine: markdown
---

A book is more than a long document: it needs numbered chapters, a table of
contents, cross-chapter references and a single bibliography. Quarto's **book**
project type handles all of it.

## The whole book is a list of chapters

````yaml
project:
  type: book
book:
  title: "A Short Haematology Handbook"
  author: "Dr Abdul Mannan"
  chapters:
    - index.qmd
    - intro.qmd
    - anaemia.qmd
    - references.qmd
format:
  html: default
  pdf:  { documentclass: scrreprt }
````

````bash
quarto render book            # → an HTML book website
quarto render book --to pdf   # → a typeset PDF
````

Reference a figure in Chapter 3 from Chapter 1 and the number resolves itself.
The output is simultaneously a navigable **website** and a print-ready **PDF** —
the same content, two finished products.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Read the demo book
Open the [**rendered handbook**](/book/_book/index.html) — a complete multi-chapter
Quarto book, built from four `.qmd` files.
:::
